title: segmentation fault on select query among big amount of data
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE mseed_catalog (starttime DateTime NOT NULL, mseed UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY starttime;
CREATE TABLE mseed_data_sample_13 (mseed UInt32, seqno UInt32, idata Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (mseed, seqno);
INSERT INTO mseed_data_sample_13 (mseed, seqno, idata) VALUES (1, 1, 3.14), (1, 2, NULL), (2, 1, 2.71);
SELECT ds.idata FROM mseed_catalog c JOIN mseed_data_sample_13 ds ON c.mseed = ds.mseed WHERE c.starttime BETWEEN '2005-01-19 00:00:00' AND '2005-01-21 23:59:59' AND ds.idata IS NOT NULL LIMIT 500;
key_bug_features: segmentation fault on select query with large data
